metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5546
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1e: Immunogold electron microscopy showed FRMPD4 (also termed PDZD10, PDZK10, Preso, Preso1) gold particles enriched in and adjacent to the PSDs in the hippocampus.

Figure 1d: Double immunofluorescent staining with confocal fluorescence microscopy of FRMPD4 and PSD95 (DLG4) showed co-localization at synaptic puncta in cultured hippocampal neurons. No co-localization was observed for GAD65.. Experimental description: mice were used throughout this study. "Preso1-/- mice were generated as follows."

"Preso1 antibodies were generated in rabbits using the rat Preso1 C terminal 20 aa or 330 aa as antigens. The antibody from 20-aa antigen was used for immunoelectron microscopy (1:100)"
